description: Visual Studio 2022 Community is open at the Start Window. Create a WPF Application (.NET 8) named 'SensorDashboard' in C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\. The application must include a model class 'Models\SensorReading.cs' with properties for SensorName (string), Value (double), Unit (string), and Timestamp (DateTime). Implement a 'ViewModels\DashboardViewModel.cs' containing an ObservableCollection of SensorReading named 'Readings' initialized with at least five sample entries. Configure MainWindow.xaml to display these readings in a ListView or ListBox bound to the 'Readings' collection, ensuring the window's DataContext is set to the DashboardViewModel and the Window Title is 'Sensor Dashboard'. The final solution must build successfully with zero errors.
